title: episcia reptans
intro: Episcia reptans, also known as the false peace lily or creeping episcia, is a species of episcia that belongs to the family Gesneriaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The leaves and roots of Episcia reptans have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Episcia reptans include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Episcia reptans can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
